_meta.description: Authored flop textures for the Board Texture trainer. texture is one of dry | wet | very-wet.

scenarios.explanation: Ace-high, rainbow, and disconnected. No flush draws and almost no straight draws - a classic dry board.
Three connected middle cards create made straights and a huge number of straight draws.
Monotone and tightly connected broadway cards - flushes are already possible plus every straight draw imaginable.
King-high, rainbow, and disconnected. Very few draws connect with this board.
Two-tone with two broadway cards gives a flush draw and some straight draws, but the 5 keeps it from being fully coordinated.
A two-tone board with connected broadways offers a flush draw plus straight draws around the J-T.
Two-tone and tightly connected - made straights, open-enders, gutshots and a flush draw all live here.
Paired and rainbow with no straight coordination - one of the driest boards possible.
Monotone broadway board: flushes are made and many strong hands and draws connect.
Rainbow and disconnected low-to-mid cards. Hard for any range to connect strongly.
Two-tone with two connected cards - a spade flush draw plus straight draws around T-9.
Rainbow with a big gap between the high card and the rest. Draws are scarce.
